component.name: Xonotic Touch
component.summary: Fast-paced arena FPS built for touchscreens on Linux

description.p: Xonotic Touch brings the fast-paced arena shooter Xonotic to Linux phones, tablets, and touch PCs. Virtual joysticks, weapon wheels, and layout presets are tuned for two-thumb play in landscape.
The Flatpak is small at install (~60 MB). Textures, maps, and music download on first launch (~3 GB) so updates stay quick.

screenshot.caption: Xonotic Touch on a touch device

description.p: Flatpak-first distribution with runtime asset download and automated CI releases.
